name: node-write
title: node-write
summary: convenience wrapper for Node.js fs methods
description:
convenience wrapper for Node.js fs methods
Write data to a file,
replacing the file if it already exists
and creating any intermediate directories if they don't already exist.
Thin wrapper around node's native fs methods.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-write because convenience wrapper for Node.js fs methods.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-write as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-write with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-write --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
